description: Centralized puzzle validation rules for board dimensions, solution requirements, and stone counts.

changelog.author: study-mode
changelog.changes: Lower min_solution_depth from 1 to 0 to admit study-mode puzzles (positions without recorded solutions). Frontend renders these via parse-time mode='study' classification; see docs/concepts/study-puzzles.md.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Replace require_solution with min_solution_depth for unified depth-range validation [1, max_solution_depth].
